name: Chicken Cacciatore
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon chopped fresh oregano OR 1 teaspoon dried oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat chicken in mixture of flour, salt, and pepper; set aside.
2. Heat oil in a 4- or 6-quart pressure cooker.
3. Saute pork until crisp. Add onions and saute until light brown; remove and set aside.
4. Brown chicken a few pieces at a time; set aside.
5. Pour off excess drippings. Stir garlic, parsley, and oregano into remaining drippings.
6. Return chicken and onion to pressure cooker.
7. Add carrots, celery, tomatoes, salt, pepper, and white wine.
8. Secure the pressure cooker cover.
9. Place pressure regulator on vent pipe.
10. Cook for 8 minutes at 15 pounds pressure with regulator rocking slowly.
11. Cool pressure cooker immediately.
12. Place chicken on a warm platter.
13. Stir tomato paste into sauce in pressure cooker until thickened.
14. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
